overview: Functional medicine clinic combining clinical care with wellness therapies and spa treatments. Offers personalized programs for chronic conditions, fertility, and preventive health.
highlights: IV therapies including vitamin shots, chelation, ozone, and EBO2
Wellness center with infrared sauna, red light therapy, contrast therapy, and massage
Full-service pharmacy with custom compounds and clinical-grade supplements
targetAudience: Individuals seeking integrated functional medicine with spa-based wellness therapies.
